titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Freshman Year, Yale University, Student Records
Freshman Year, Yale University, Student Records
titlestmt.author: compiled by Daniel Hartwig

controlnote.p: This encoded finding aid is compliant with the Yale EAD Best Practice Guidelines, Version 1.0.

descriptivenote.p: Finding aid description and metadata in Archives at Yale are licensed under a CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. This means that anyone may copy, modify, and distribute this descriptive metadata without restriction or permission. The CC0 license is explained in full on the Creative Commons website: CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. More information is available on our Help page.

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Sunday June 4, 2023 at 09:26

did.unittitle: Freshman Year, Yale University, student records
did.abstract: The records consist of student records maintained by the Yale Freshman Year.

odd.head: General note
odd.p: Forms part of Yale Record Group 12-D (YRG 12-D), Student records for the Yale Freshman Year.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Access to the records is partially restricted. See Collection Contents for details.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Freshman Year, Yale University, Student Records (RU 879). Manuscripts and Archives, Yale University Library.

processinfo.head: Processing Information
processinfo.p: Yale University records are arranged and described at the accession level by the creating office. The University Archives creates collection level descriptive records, but typically does no further arrangement and description at the accession level.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The records consist of student records maintained by the Yale Freshman Year.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: The records are arranged by accession.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: The materials are open for research.

did.unittitle: Class schedules for students of the Freshman Year
Student records for students withdrawn from the Freshman Year
Class records (grades, class lists, etc.), classes of 1924 - 1945W
Student record cards of the Freshman Year for the Classes of 1940-1955
Student record cards of the freshman year for the classes of 1924-1939

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: The materials are open for research.
